message:
fix(connectors): Zapier, n8n, Make RateLimited error mapping to FcpError::RateLimited

All three connectors incorrectly mapped their RateLimited variant to
FcpError::External instead of FcpError::RateLimited, losing semantic
rate-limit information for the FCP retry controller.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
